item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-3629 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-3629 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
The Import and export users and customers plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to privilege escalation in all versions up to, and including, 1.29.7. This is due to the 'save_extra_user_profile_fields' function not properly restricting which user meta keys can be updated via profile fields. The 'get_restricted_fields' method does not include sensitive meta keys such as 'wp_capabilities'. This makes it possible for unaut...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3629

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8114-1: GVfs vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8114-1: GVfs vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that the GVfs FTP backend incorrectly handled IP addresses and ports returned by passive mode responses. A malicious remote server could possibly use this issue to help scan for open ports. (CVE-2026-28295) It was discovered that the GVfs FTP backend incorrectly handled crafted file paths. A remote attacker could use this issue to terminate or inject arbitrary FTP commands, or possibly execute arbit...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8114-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8113-1: LibTIFF vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8113-1: LibTIFF vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that LibTIFF did not properly handle memory when processing certain images. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause LibTIFF to crash, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2025-61143) It was discovered that LibTIFF did not properly handle memory when processing malformed TIFF directories. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause LibTIFF to crash, resulting in a denial of servic...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8113-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-10736 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-10736 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
The ReviewX – WooCommerce Product Reviews with Multi-Criteria, Reminder Emails, Google Reviews, Schema & More plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of data due to improper authorization checks on the userAccessibility() function in all versions up to, and including, 2.2.10. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to access protected REST API endpoints, extract and modify information r...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-10736

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8115-1: pyOpenSSL vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8115-1: pyOpenSSL vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that pyOpenSSL incorrectly handled exceptions in the tlsext_servername callback. This could result in connections being accepted after an exception, contrary to expectations. (CVE-2026-27448) It was discovered that pyOpenSSL incorrectly handled the DTLS cookie generation callback. If a callback provided cookie values greater than 256 bytes, an attacker could use this issue to cause pyOpenSSL to cras...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8115-1

item.title: [Segurança] Hackers Exploit CVE-2025-32975 (CVSS 10.0) to Hijack Unpatched Quest KACE SMA Systems
item.description:
🚨 Hackers Exploit CVE-2025-32975 (CVSS 10.0) to Hijack Unpatched Quest KACE SMA Systems
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 0.0
Resumo:
Threat actors are suspected to be exploiting a maximum-severity security flaw impacting Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA), according to Arctic Wolf. The cybersecurity company said it observed malicious activity starting the week of March 9, 2026, in customer environments that's consistent with the exploitation of CVE-2025-32975 on unpatched SMA systems exposed to the internet.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/hackers-exploit-cve-2025-32975-cvss-100.html

item.title: [Segurança] CISA orders feds to patch DarkSword iOS flaws exploited attacks
item.description:
💣 CISA orders feds to patch DarkSword iOS flaws exploited attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government agencies to patch three iOS vulnerabilities targeted in cryptocurrency theft and cyberespionage attacks using the DarkSword exploit kit.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-darksword-ios-flaws-exploited-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] ⚡ Weekly Recap: CI/CD Backdoor, FBI Buys Location Data, WhatsApp Ditches Numbers & More
item.description:
💣 ⚡ Weekly Recap: CI/CD Backdoor, FBI Buys Location Data, WhatsApp Ditches Numbers & More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Another week, another reminder that the internet is still a mess. Systems people thought were secure are being broken in simple ways, showing many still ignore basic advisories. This edition covers a mix of issues: supply chain attacks hitting CI/CD setups, long-abused IoT devices being shut down, and exploits moving quickly from disclosure to real attacks.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/weekly-recap-cicd-backdoor-fbi-buys.html

item.title: [Segurança] Qualys Debuts Industry's First AI Agent for Safe Exploit Validation and Autonomous Remediation - PR Newswire
item.description:
💣 Qualys Debuts Industry's First AI Agent for Safe Exploit Validation and Autonomous Remediation - PR Newswire
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Qualys. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Infraestrutura] VCF 9.0 Delivers 5.6X Pod Density and 4.9X Faster Pod Readiness than Red Hat OpenShift
item.description:
📰 VCF 9.0 Delivers 5.6X Pod Density and 4.9X Faster Pod Readiness than Red Hat OpenShift
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
A recent independent study, conducted by Principled Technologies, compared Kubernetes pod density and pod readiness speed between two environments – VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.0 with vSphere Kubernetes Service (VKS) 3.6 and Red Hat OpenShift 4.21 on bare metal. In this blog, we take a look at how the results of that independent study conclude …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/03/21/vcf-9-0-delivers-5-6x-pod-density-and-4-9x-faster-pod-readiness-than-red-hat-openshift/

item.title: [Segurança] Trivy vulnerability scanner breach pushed infostealer via GitHub Actions
item.description:
📰 Trivy vulnerability scanner breach pushed infostealer via GitHub Actions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Trivy vulnerability scanner was compromised in a supply-chain attack by threat actors known as TeamPCP, which distributed credential-stealing malware through official releases and GitHub Actions.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/trivy-vulnerability-scanner-breach-pushed-infostealer-via-github-actions/

item.title: [Segurança] FBI warns of Handala hackers using Telegram in malware attacks
item.description:
📰 FBI warns of Handala hackers using Telegram in malware attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) warned network defenders that Iranian hackers linked to the country's Ministry of Intelligence and Security (MOIS) are using Telegram in malware attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/fbi-warns-of-handala-hackers-using-telegram-in-malware-attacks/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Strengthening the Cloud-Native Ecosystem Through Upstream Collaboration
item.description:
📰 Strengthening the Cloud-Native Ecosystem Through Upstream Collaboration
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Open source thrives on shared ownership, open governance, and collaboration across companies and communities. At Broadcom, our approach to cloud-native innovation is rooted in contributing as maintainers, contributors, and collaborators within the communities that evolve the technologies modern platforms depend on. Earlier this year, we shared our broader plans1 for deeper engagement with the Cloud …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/03/23/strengthening-the-cloud-native-ecosystem-through-upstream-collaboration/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Accelerating Customer Success with Expanded Partnerships across the Kubernetes Ecosystem
item.description:
📰 Accelerating Customer Success with Expanded Partnerships across the Kubernetes Ecosystem
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the rapidly evolving world of cloud-native development, a Kubernetes platform is only as strong as the ecosystem that supports it. We view a robust ecosystem of partner validated products as the essential engine for customer experience and their sustained success. While VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) delivers the secure, enterprise-grade private cloud, its full potential …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/03/23/accelerating-customer-success-with-expanded-partnerships-across-the-kubernetes-ecosystem/
